negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_052
prompt: The video opens with a static shot of a grocery store shelf, showcasing a variety of Lay's potato chip packages in green, pink, yellow, and orange cans, some adorned with Chinese text. Below the chips, smaller boxes of cookies or biscuits are neatly arranged. A shopping cart with red handles is partially visible in front of the shelf. The bright indoor lighting highlights the retail setting. Two robotic arms equipped with grippers are positioned on either side of the frame. As the video progresses, a robotic arm on the right side of the frame moves toward the green Lay's package, securely grasps it, lifts it off the shelf, and deposits it into the shopping cart. The robotic arm then retracts, leaving the shelf and shopping cart unchanged. The video concludes with the robotic arm exiting the frame, and the shelf remaining organized, with no further alterations to the scene.
